components.title: Email Security Policy
components.description: Defines requirements for securing email communications, including anti-phishing controls, attachment and link scanning, email encryption, and acceptable use obligations for all email system users. Mandates SPF, DKIM, and DMARC configuration for all sending domains.
components.purpose: Establish and enforce email security controls to protect against phishing and malware.

control-implementations.description: Control implementations for Email Security Policy.

implemented-requirements.description: The email security policy requires email content filtering capable of detecting and blocking malicious attachments and links, including sandbox detonation of attachments before delivery to end users.

The email security policy restricts execution of active content (scripts, macros) delivered via email. Attachments containing active content must be evaluated by an email scanning solution before delivery.
The email security policy requires that email client security settings are hardened and locked, preventing users from bypassing scanning or enabling unsafe content rendering in email messages.
